LanguageData.FCP_Title_Enclave_Captain.description: Senior field officers who command company-sized units. Captains are proven leaders with extensive combat experience. They handle complex operations and serve as the 英克雷's primary tactical commanders.
LanguageData.FCP_Title_Enclave_Captain.label: 队长
LanguageData.FCP_Title_Enclave_Colonel.description: High-ranking officers who oversee strategic operations and base management. Colonels answer directly to the 英克雷 leadership and are responsible for executing the organization's broader objectives. They command respect and absolute authority.
LanguageData.FCP_Title_Enclave_Colonel.label: 上校
LanguageData.FCP_Title_Enclave_Lieutenant.description: 负责排级行动的初级军官。中尉协调多个小队并在战场上做出战术决策。他们预计将展示战斗能力和领导能力。
LanguageData.FCP_Title_Enclave_Lieutenant.label: 中尉
LanguageData.FCP_Title_Enclave_Private.description: The lowest rank in the 英克雷 military structure. Privates are frontline s老旧iers, trained in the use of advanced weaponry and power armor. They carry out orders without question and serve as the backbone of 英克雷 forces.
LanguageData.FCP_Title_Enclave_Private.label: 私人的
LanguageData.FCP_Title_Enclave_Sergeant.description: Non-commissioned officers who lead s商场 squads in the field. Sergeants are experienced s老旧iers who maintain discipline and coordinate tactical operations. They bridge the gap between officers and enlisted personnel.
LanguageData.FCP_Title_Enclave_Sergeant.label: 军士
